artPrompt: A scrawny goblin rogue presses himself against a rain-slick alley wall, eyes huge and darting, sweat beading in the amber lamplight as he clutches his collar, his trembling form half-swallowed by towering ink-black shadow shapes that lean toward him like accusers. His upturned face foreshortened toward the viewer, cigar smoke curling past, twitchy criminal dread. Rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: Nervous Snitch
text: When Nervous Snitch dies, look at the top two cards of your library. Put one into your hand and the other into your graveyard. He always knew where the bodies were. Now he is one.
flavorText: "I didn't see nothing. I'd never say nothing. Please don't tell the Don I said nothing."
